mnemonics: ACE (Assess Continuously for Excellence) - A mnemonic for the purpose of CIE: to continuously Assess for Course Excellence, ensuring it's not just a final exam.
keyPoints: CIE is an ongoing process to evaluate student learning throughout the semester.
It uses diverse methods like quizzes, assignments, presentations, and mini-projects.
Its goal is to provide continuous feedback and reduce reliance on a single final exam.
commonMistakes: Treating CIE as a mere formality instead of a core learning feedback tool.
Procrastinating on CIE components, causing last-minute stress and poor performance.
Focusing only on scoring marks rather than understanding the feedback provided.
